---
title: "Main_data_cleaning"
author: "MIKE"
date: "2026-03-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# clean data

```{r}
my_data = read.csv("depression_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = TRUE)

removes = c("Name")
my_data[removes] = NULL
=======


str(my_data)

char_cols <- sapply(my_data, is.character)
my_data[char_cols] <- lapply(my_data[char_cols], as.factor)

summary(my_data)
```

# export

```{r}
saveRDS(my_data, file = "cleaned_depression.rds")
```
